message:
test(bd-9chy.47): mark NativeFile-dependent stdio tests as requiring LD_PRELOAD

glibc validates FILE* vtable pointers, causing unit tests to crash when
using NativeFile streams directly. Mark these tests as requiring
LD_PRELOAD integration testing.

Tests marked:
- fopen mode parsing (r, w, a, r+, w+, a+, b, x, e)
- fopen path handling (long, spaces)
- fopen fd lifecycle
- fdopen valid fd
- fopencookie callbacks
- fclose foreign stream handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
